title: Condense
description: Explore the perfect Minecraft modpack for adventurers. Discover Terralith's diverse biomes, uncover YUNG's captivating structures, automate with Create and its add-ons. All within a meticulously curated selection of mods, blending vanilla and new content.
body:
## Information

Condense is a vanilla friendly modpack created by "mrsanner" and "kermit the Impartial" himself. 

It adds lots of quality of life/optimization mods as well as new content to the game including: Create, Ad Astra, Farmer's Delight, EDFR, and much more.

Our choice of terrain generation mods include: Terralith, Tectonic, Nullscape, Incendium (biomes only).

With vanilla friendly structures being added by: Explorify, YUNG's, and ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village.

Khalija --> Condense
This modpack has now been condensed(get it)/renamed into one version called "Condense". For remote server/client only side use separately disable mods catagorized as: Client OR Server.
